sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Execute: 6 UP + 2 LEFT to reach (9, 15) and collect all yellow dots
result = action(['UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'LEFT', 'LEFT'])
print("Action result:", result)

seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

# Find player
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"Player at: {n['boundary']}")
        break

# Check yellow dots
yellow_1px = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'Y' and n['pixels'] == 1]
print(f"Yellow 1px dots remaining: {len(yellow_1px)}")

# Check level completion
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
print(f"Done: {last_action_result.get('done')}")
print(f"Score: {last_action_result.get('score')}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
